name: travel-itinerary
description: Travel planning workflow for idea discovery, artifact intake, partial-plan completion, and fixed-place itinerary cleanup. A four-interface map pipeline (discovery -> planner -> supplement -> trip-print-v2) with path triage and pre-work gates (fact-precheck, feasibility, eligibility). Produces source-checked, image-rich HTML-first travel guides whose final PDFs are browser-exported from the HTML/CSS print source, with geography/time validation, a trip-wide constraints layer (budget tier, companion structure, theme/pilgrimage), multi-city and cross-border skeletons, weather awareness, and a solo-traveler safety layer.
